title: TorchBowMod
body:
# TorchBowMod

## 📢 Update Notice
- **2025/09/20**  
    - Forge 1.21.5 support  
    - NeoForge, Fabric 1.21.5 ~ 1.21.7 support  
- **2025/09/15**  
    - Forge, NeoForge, Fabric 1.21.1 and 1.21.8 support  
- **2025/02/23**  
    - NeoForge 1.21.4: Added support for [Ceiling Torch](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ceiling-torch)  
- **2023/06/19**  
    - Quilt 1.20.1 support  

####  **Note:** When requesting addition of other mods compatibility or support for a new Minecraft version, please specify either **Forge** , **NeoForge**  or **Fabric**.

---

## 📮 Contact Us
🔗 [nkun.dev - Contact](https://nkun.dev/contact)

---

## 🌐 Community
💬 [Discord TorchBowMod](https://discord.gg/Fa9vNxFcva)

---

## 🔥 What does this mod do?
This mod adds a bow that can **shoot and set up torches**.

---

## 🛠️ Recipes
- **Torch Bow**  
![Torch Bow](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/XusP2ULz/images/674698cf4a3556617f8d36b6fd2792251b9eedda.png)  
- **Multi Torch**  
![Multi Torch](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/XusP2ULz/images/4b8661eeeff6471b038b57a1de8486a1fa1eb5e0.png)  
- **Torch Arrow**  
![Torch Arrow](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/XusP2ULz/images/8daed86e4e97ad1981dec6ec93a97f03e7b5b3be.png)

---

## 🔧 How to repair
You can repair the TorchBow by using **Flint and Steel** on an anvil.  
*Available on Minecraft 1.14.x and higher only.*

---

## 🎯 How to use
Requires **Forge**, **NeoForge**, **Fabric**, or **Quilt**.

### **Torch Bow**  
Consumes torches (or multi-torches) from your inventory and shoots them to place torches.  

### **Multi Torch**  
Shoots and places **nine torches at once**.  

### **Torch Arrow**  
Can be shot using a vanilla bow. Places torches on the ground.  
Of course, it also works with the TorchBow.  

---

## 🧩 Supported Mods

### ✅ Minecraft 1.21.1 and later  
*(only for TorchBowMod version **1.1.0 or higher**)*  

TorchBowMod now automatically supports **torch items whose blocks extend `WallTorchBlock`**.  
- Verified with the following mods:
    - **[MoreTorchVariants](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-torch-variants)** (except Redstone Torch) — *1.21.4 [Fabric]*  
    - **[Adorn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/adorn)** (Stone Torch) — *1.21.1 [NeoForge/Fabric]*  
    - **[More Beautiful Torches](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-beautiful-torches)** (except Redstone Torch) — *1.21.1 [Forge/NeoForge/Fabric]*  
    - **[Colored Torches](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/colored-torches)** (all torches) — *1.21.4 [NeoForge]*  

In addition, for **NeoForge builds**, if [Ceiling Torch](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ceiling-torch) is installed,  
you can also place torches on the underside of blocks.

---

### 🕹️ Minecraft 1.7.10 ~ 1.16.2  
*Only the Forge version of TorchBowMod is compatible with these mods.*

- [StorageBox](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/break-all-of-the-same-block-and-more)  
- MoreInventoryMod  
- [Silent's Gems](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/silents-gems)  
- [Torch Bandoiler](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/torch-bandolier)  
- Galacticraft  
- [Ceiling Torch](https://modrinth.com/mod/ceiling-torch)
---

## 🌍 Language Support
- Japanese (日本語)  
- English (英語)  
- German (ドイツ語)  
- Russian (ロシア語)  
- Korean (韓国語)  
- Chinese (繁体字)  

---
